method: Signed within-study z-score signature scoring with explicit missing-gene reporting.

TCMR_IFNG_CYTOTOXIC.name: TCMR IFN-gamma cytotoxic signature
TCMR_IFNG_CYTOTOXIC.description: A compact demonstration signature for T cell-mediated rejection, combining IFN-gamma chemokines and cytotoxic T/NK markers.
TCMR_IFNG_CYTOTOXIC.assay_scale: mean signed within-study z-score across observed signature genes
TCMR_IFNG_CYTOTOXIC.scoring_method: For each gene, z-score normalized log2 intensity across all study samples is multiplied by the curated direction (+1/-1); sample score is the mean of observed signed z-scores.

FIBROSIS_ECM.name: Fibrosis extracellular matrix signature
FIBROSIS_ECM.description: A compact ECM/fibrosis marker panel for graft fibrosis exploration; not a clinical classifier.
FIBROSIS_ECM.assay_scale: mean signed within-study z-score across observed signature genes
FIBROSIS_ECM.scoring_method: For each gene, z-score normalized log2 intensity across all study samples is multiplied by the curated direction (+1/-1); sample score is the mean of observed signed z-scores.
